_note: Tokens for Header Wrapper. The bg prop describes the page background BELOW the header, not the header's own color. Extracted from Figma Core (nGsiItayj12cfi3AKbP1mB), node 7511:31768.

stroke.description: Bottom border separating the header from page content. Always 1px, both variants.

sunken._description: Applied when the page background below is surface/sunken. Header floats above the recessed content.

surface._description: Applied when the page background below is surface/default (same tone as the header). No rounding.

borderRadius.note: All four corners. The header is flush with the page content.
